message:
fix: Fenwick tree i32::MIN panic, set() truncation, and task panic logging

- fenwick.rs: extract update_u32() using wrapping_add for both positive
  and negative deltas via two's complement, fixing a debug-mode panic
  when update() was called with i32::MIN (negation overflow)
- fenwick.rs: fix set() using wrapping_sub in u32 space instead of
  i64→i32 cast, which silently truncated deltas exceeding i32 range
- program.rs: log spawned task panics instead of silently dropping them
  via `let _ = handle.join()`, making background task failures visible

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
